'''鈭歬-v-ng-sh''' ('''kakavngeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forecast|forecast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-v-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forecast|forecast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-v-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kakavngeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikavngeshoko|thikavngeshoko]] || [[word:jikavngeshoko|jikavngeshoko]] || [[word:shikavngeshoko|shikavngeshoko]] || [[word:kikavngeshoko|kikavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukavngeshoko|thuthukavngeshoko]] || [[word:jujukavngeshoko|jujukavngeshoko]] || [[word:shushukavngeshoko|shushukavngeshoko]] || [[word:kukukavngeshoko|kukukavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukavngeshoko|thukavngeshoko]] || [[word:jukavngeshoko|jukavngeshoko]] || [[word:shukavngeshoko|shukavngeshoko]] || [[word:kukavngeshoko|kukavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukavngeshoko|thukavngeshoko]] || [[word:jukavngeshoko|jukavngeshoko]] || [[word:shukavngeshoko|shukavngeshoko]] || [[word:kukavngeshoko|kukavngeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokavngeshoko|thothokavngeshoko]] || [[word:jojokavngeshoko|jojokavngeshoko]] || [[word:shoshokavngeshoko|shoshokavngeshoko]] || [[word:kokokavngeshoko|kokokavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokavngeshoko|thokavngeshoko]] || [[word:jokavngeshoko|jokavngeshoko]] || [[word:shokavngeshoko|shokavngeshoko]] || [[word:kokavngeshoko|kokavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokavngeshoko|thokavngeshoko]] || [[word:jokavngeshoko|jokavngeshoko]] || [[word:shokavngeshoko|shokavngeshoko]] || [[word:kokavngeshoko|kokavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙kavngeshoko|th忙kavngeshoko]] || [[word:j忙kavngeshoko|j忙kavngeshoko]] || [[word:sh忙kavngeshoko|sh忙kavngeshoko]] || [[word:k忙kavngeshoko|k忙kavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakavngeshoko|thathakavngeshoko]] || [[word:jajakavngeshoko|jajakavngeshoko]] || [[word:shashakavngeshoko|shashakavngeshoko]] || [[word:kakakavngeshoko|kakakavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakavngeshoko|thakavngeshoko]] || [[word:jakavngeshoko|jakavngeshoko]] || [[word:shakavngeshoko|shakavngeshoko]] || [[word:kakavngeshoko|kakavngeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakavngeshoko|thakavngeshoko]] || [[word:jakavngeshoko|jakavngeshoko]] || [[word:shakavngeshoko|shakavngeshoko]] || [[word:kakavngeshoko|kakavngeshoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
